description.ko: 소리의 보이지 않는 구조를 시각적으로 탐구하며, 음향 주파수가 어둡고 무한한 공간 속에서 빛나는 기하학적 구조와 리드미컬한 빛의 맥동으로 나타납니다.
description.en: A visual journey into the unseen architecture of sound, where acoustic frequencies manifest as luminous geometric structures and rhythmic light pulses within a dark, infinite space.

prompt: ECHO-0 concept, abstract sound visualization, glowing neon liquid frequencies vibrating in a void, intricate golden geometric patterns emerging from sonic pulses, deep blue light trails, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, macro shot of acoustic resonance, ethereal atmosphere, procedural wave displacement
